x-enumeration-literals.name: Contact Handling Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that manages and supports interactions, communications, and service handling activities between a customer and an organization.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Dialogue Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that facilitates an ongoing conversational interaction or exchange of information between a customer and the institution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Channel Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that controls and manages operational activities for a customer interaction or service delivery channel.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Gateway Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that manages the routing, connectivity, translation, and operational exchange of messages or transactions between systems or networks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Switch Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that controls the routing, authorization, and switching of financial transactions between connected payment or transaction networks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Device Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that manages the operational use, connectivity, status, and servicing activities of a physical or digital device.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interbank Transaction Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that manages operational interactions, transaction exchanges, and processing activities between banking institutions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Correspondence Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that manages operational communications, document exchanges, notifications, or formal correspondence activities between parties.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interactive Help Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that provides operational support, guidance, assistance, or help interaction services to users or customers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ACH Operating Session
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Session that manages automated clearing house processing, routing, clearing, and settlement activities for electronic payment transactions.
